title: InternationalCitrusTrade
description: Data model for international trade statistics of citrus products, based on sources such as UN Comtrade and aligned with global trade data standards. It captures key variables including origin/destination countries, HS codes, trade values, volumes, and time periods. Designed to support consistent analysis, comparison, and integration with economic data systems.

type.description: Property. NGSI Entity Type. It has to be InternationalCitrusTrade.

typeCode.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Units: 'Code'. Type code of the trade record.

refPeriodId.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Units: 'YYYYMM00'. Internal reference period identifier.

refYear.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units: 'YYYY'. Reference year of the trade record.

refMonth.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units: 'MM'. Reference month of the trade record.

period.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Units: 'YYYYMM'. The period of the trade data.

reporterCode.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Units: 'Code'. Code of the reporting country.

reporterISO.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Units: 'ISO Code'. ISO code of the reporting country.

reporterDesc.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Units: 'Country'. Country or region reporting the trade.

flowCode.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Units: 'Code'. Code identifying the trade flow type.

flowDesc.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Units: 'Flow'. Description of the trade flow

partnerCode.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Units: 'Code'. Code of the primary partner country.

partnerISO.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Units: 'ISO Code'. ISO code of the primary partner country.

partnerDesc.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Units: 'Country'. Primary trading partner country or region.

partner2Code.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Units: 'Code'. Code of the secondary partner country.

partner2ISO.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Units: 'ISO Code'. ISO Code of the secondary partner country.

partner2Desc.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Units: 'Country'. Description of the second partner country.

classificationCode.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Units: 'Code'. Product classification code.

classificationSearchCode.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Units: 'Code'. Search code used for the classification.

isOriginalClassification.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Boolean'. Units: 'true/false'. Flag indicating if original classification was used.

aggrLevel.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units: 'Code'. Level of data aggregation.

isLeaf.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Boolean'. Units: 'true/false'. Flag indicating if this is the lowest level of the product classification tree.

customsCode.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Units: 'Code'. Customs procedure code.

customsDesc.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Units: 'Customs Procedure'. Description of the customs procedure.

mosCode.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Units: 'Code'. Mode of Supply code.

motCode.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Units: 'Code'. Mode of Transport code.

motDesc.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Units: 'Mode of Transport'. Mode of Transport description.

qtyUnitCode.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units: 'Code'. Code for the quantity unit.

qtyUnitAbbr.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Units: 'SI Units'. Abbreviation of the quantity unit.

isQtyEstimated.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Boolean'. Units: 'true/false'. Flag indicating if the quantity is estimated.

altQtyUnitCode.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units: 'Code'. Code for the alternative quantity unit.

altQtyUnitAbbr.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Units: 'Alternative units'. Abbreviation of the alternative quantity unit.

altQty.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units: 'altQtyUnitAbbr'. Alternative trade quantity if applicable.

isAltQtyEstimated.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Boolean'. Units: 'true/false'. Flag indicating if the alternative quantity is estimated.

isNetWgtEstimated.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Boolean'. Units: 'true/false'. Flag indicating if the net weight is estimated.

isGrossWgtEstimated.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Boolean'. Units: 'true/false'. Flag indicating if the gross weight is estimated.

cifvalue.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units: 'USD ($)'. Cost, Insurance, and Freight (CIF) value.

fobvalue.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units: 'USD ($)'. Free on Board (FOB) value.

primaryValue.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units: 'USD ($)'. The primary statistical value recorded.

legacyEstimationFlag.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Units: 'Code'. Legacy system flag for estimations.

isReported.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Boolean'. Units: 'true/false'. Flag indicating if the data was explicitly reported by the country.

isAggregate.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Boolean'. Units: 'true/false'. Flag indicating if the data is aggregated.
